title: Sugar Beach
overview: A brilliant yet haunted valedictorian seeks refuge in a passionate throuple, but when their intoxicating world unravels, she must confront her past before it destroys her.

title: The Last Solution
overview: Within the confines of a massive wall, a group of children plays as if there were no tomorrow

title: Chakravaat
overview: Trapped in an endless time loop, a desperate human races against the clock to escape a relentless cycle of terror. With every reset, shadowy figures emerge from the darkness—silent, unstoppable, and closing in for the kill. As reality frays at the edges, he must unravel the mystery of the loop before the shadows claim him forever. A gripping, atmospheric horror short that blends suspense, mystery, and unrelenting dread.

title: The Barrel
overview: A young prankster wakes trapped in a metal barrel in an abandoned workshop. He must find a way out and learn how and why he got there. Estranged from his devout father, he can only rely on him, shackled to a pole nearby, for guidance.

title: Günce
overview: A young woman forced by her family to study a major she doesn't want, finds her only escape in her passion for the sky while caught between economic struggles and social norms.

title: Blue Zone
overview: A team of soldiers are sent to investigate a strange anomaly near enemy lines, only to discover that their mission holds far more dangers than they initially bargained for.

title: Dark Hours
overview: When a hacker hired by a mysterious entity discovers that there is more than one party interested in the task he was assigned, not only will his job be at risk, but also his life.

title: Silent Descent
overview: New La Quinzaine Studio movie. Plot TBA

title: Three Hits
overview: Once classmates Petar, Strahinja, and Lazar reunite for their prom anniversary and are forced to face old wounds during one turbulent night.

title: SOMEHOW.
overview: When a relationship goes awry, a couple must figure out how to communicate and cope.

title: The Alice Paradox
overview: Alice travels through a wormhole, and is transported into an alternate version of the recent past where she encounters different versions of herself and her friend and lab partner, Bob. Trapped in a world that has diverged from ours during the Cold War, and which prizes collectivism over individuality, Alice is forced to confront her life choices, grappling with profound questions about identity, fate, and the search for meaning.

title: World Beyond: Ground Zero
overview: In a harsh, lawless world where trust is rare and survival comes at a cost.

title: Roll the Clip!
overview: Upcoming mockumentary short film from Andrew Reid.

title: Untitled Banditos! Sequel
overview: Thomas Kitt returns, this time a fully fledged MI6 agent.

title: The World Is Our Dance Floor
overview: Exactly one year after a tragedy, a young writer carries on through the night as though it were any other. What first appears ordinary gradually reveals itself as something far more fragile.

title: Scary Movie
overview: Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer, the Core Four are back in the killer's crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe.

title: Masters of the Universe
overview: After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor. To save his family and his world, Adam must join forces with his closest allies, Teela and Duncan/Man-At-Arms, and embrace his true destiny as He-Man — the most powerful man in the universe.

title: De Gaulle: Tilting Iron (Film 1)
overview: Part one of a two-part biopic following French army officer Charles De Gaulle's life and political commitment between 1940 and 1945, and trace his development towards a political career.

title: Nobody's Son
overview: The script centres on Mathilda and Thomas, married for over 15 years. They’ve always dreamed of having children, but their efforts were only met with failures. After having adopted Mapring, a 4-year-old boy from Thailand, their life takes a tragic turn when Mathilda dies in an accident. Thomas then finds himself alone with a child he hadn’t really wanted. Devastated by this loss and incapable of forming a bond with Mapring, he decides to go look for the child’s biological family. Accompanied by Chaan, a local guide, Thomas starts on a trying journey through Thailand. Over time, father and son start to tame each other and create bonds… However, a crucial question remains: what will Thomas do when he finds Mapring’s biological family?

title: Onethong
overview: A modern-day woman finds herself transported into the body of Onethong, a character in the literary world of Khun Chang Khun Phaen. She must survive and find a way to escape the tragic fate of the character, who is destined to face execution.

title: A Thing of the Past
overview: A pharmaceutical trial promises Aya her lost memories, but as they return, her body begins to manifest them in disturbing ways.

title: First to Fifty
overview: Guided by a legendary figure of the Finnish wood throwing game, a group of mates form Australia’s first ever team to compete at the Mölkky World Championships.

title: Toxic
overview: Set in a bygone era, this gripping tale unfolds in the coastal paradise of Goa, wherea powerful drug cartel pulls the strings behind a facade of sun-soaked beaches and vibrant culture.

title: Zero A.D.
overview: A brutal ruler fears a prophecy and orders the death of a child—one who will change history.

title: On the Road
overview: Veneno, a rebellious young drifter, frequents roadside diners where he sleeps with truck drivers. Urgently needing a ride, he meets Muñeco, a hard-edged driver who keeps to himself. He convinces Muñeco to take him deep into the hyper-masculine world of long-haul trucking across the north of Mexico. As they travel together and an unexpected intimacy builds between them, shadows from Veneno’s past resurface, putting both their lives at risk.

title: Sleep No More
overview: Two sisters deal with the sudden death of their mother at a wig factory. One believes it was suicide while the other is certain it was a result of possession and takes a job at the factory to uncover the truth. Meanwhile, their brother - born with an eerie gift to regenerate his own body - catches the attention of a ghostly figure roaming the factory, searching for a vessel to inhabit.

title: A Quiet House
overview: SHE’S ALWAYS BEEN AN OLD SOUL Sian and Lewis, are a married couple spend who their days attempting to reach out to their daughter, Hope. Sian brings meals to their room whilst Lewis waits and listens. However, the couple are stuck in a loop that conceals reality. The evening brings warmth and comfort, whilst the harsh morning light reveals the truth of what lies beyond Hope’s door.

title: Cordélicos: A Origem do Cabra da Peste
I Understand Your Displeasure
overview: Heike works at a cleaning company, where every day she has to handle her team’s struggles, the pressure of delivering a spotless job, and the need to keep clients and boss happy. When a powerful subcontractor threatens to withdraw his support if she does not provide more work for his team, Heike faces a difficult choice. To comply, she must sacrifice one of her own employees. As the pressure closes in, Heike must decide how far she is willing to go to meet the job’s ruthless demands.

title: Love( ) Mave
overview: The journey of Mavis, a 23 year old writer based in New York, who's longing for love has had a turbulence lately; despite living the "happily ever after" with her long term boyfriend - Rehan. Being the gifted writer that she is, ironically she can't seem to find the words to express the sudden shift of feelings towards her partner. Tackling themes such as guilt, love, and falling out of it; Love ( ) Mave explores what it's like to be in love with someone with all your being, but just not the way as you had before and all the strings of intimacy in between.

title: Carolina Caroline
overview: A young woman skips her small town — in search of her estranged mother — alongside a charismatic con man on the run from the law. The duo leave a wave of crime and passion behind them as they hustle their way through the Southeast.

title: Madfabulous
overview: When the flamboyant Henry Paget arrives in 1890s North Wales to claim his aristocratic inheritance, his theatrical flair and defiant eccentricities send shockwaves through the upper-class elite, much to the amusement of the local townspeople. Alongside his spirited cousin, Lily, and loyal butler, Gelert, Henry tries to carve out his own identity as the Fifth Marquess, navigating suffocating traditions, scheming relatives, and the long shadow cast by his estranged father.

title: All That We Never Were
overview: 19-year-old Leah navigates a coming-of-age journey in the wake of a tragic car accident that claims her parents. Relocated to a coastal town under the care of her brother’s best friend Axel, Leah grapples with grief, haunting nightmares and a fractured sense of self.

title: A Sucker's Born Every Minute
overview: Toni, once a famous singer, now has gambling debts and struggles to make ends meet. His luck changes when Malena, a former lover, introduces him to Junior, a wealthy young man, ready to hire him to steal a priceless painting from his own mother. To carry out this supposedly easy heist, Toni recruits a clumsy crew, forming a team in which each one pursues their own interests.

title: Dead End
overview: Located in a futuristic Dhaka City from the 2100s. We follow Zayn Khan our protagonist, a genius engineer trying to fulfill his father's dream. However, he gets intertwined with a street racing gang named 'The Hawks', lead by Alvan Haque.

title: Another League
overview: Spain, the 1970s. Although Francoist ideology remains deeply entrenched in society, a group of young trailblazers and an ambitious promoter are about to change the history of women’s football.

title: Turncoat
overview: A psychotic mastermind holds a group of interconnected strangers captive in a manipulative game with deadly consequences. Young and old, sinners and saints — everyone's guilty of something, but no one wants to pay the price.

title: Spoken
overview: A career built, challenged, and unraveled in public - told only through what was said at the time.

title: The Gift
overview: After eight long years of grief, Monica - in an act of vengeance - captures the man responsible for her pain and suffering, but they both soon discover that the truth is far more complex and sickening.

title: 山口くんはワルくない
Truly Mine
overview: Leila, an 18-year-old girl who is on the brink of adulthood. As the pressure of her family's expectations grows, Leila has to choose between a life laid out for her or freedom, risking everything she loves for a life that's truly hers.

title: SUFFICIENT SIDE EFFECTS The Making Of Magenta House
overview: SUFFICIENT SIDE EFFECTS is the definitive behind the scenes look at the making of Magenta House using extensive behind the scenes footage shot during the production of the film and interviews with most of the crew and some of the cast. It’s a unique opportunity to showcase the creation of fully independent student film which we had full control over. The good, the bad and the ugly side of film making is on full display going through all the ups and downs of such a production and hearing from those who created it both pre and post filming and right up to the film’s premiere at the Horror On Sea Film Festival.

title: Yurt
overview: A behind-the-scenes look at the shooting of a portion of The Short Life of Jaxon Blume on an apple farm in Kent, United Kingdom.

title: Jeffrey Epstein: The Bad Sleep Well
overview: Over the course of one troubled week, Jeffrey Epstein struggles with guilt, ambition, and growing pressure as his world of wealth and influence begins to close in on him.

title: Wilbert Thaggot
overview: Wilbert Thaggot is about an orphan living in Calgary during Late 2011 and Early 2012, who is just trying to make his way through life and survive in a crazy world.

title: Todo: Beneath the Flower
overview: Rendered in PS1-style 3D, Todo: Beneath the Flower follows a masked wanderer travelling through a surreal, low-poly world in search of the secret that blooms beneath a single flower.

title: Castration Movie Anthology iii. Year of the Hyaena
overview: Izzy seeks out everything in her power to stop her partner from transitioning. Meanwhile, Michaela tries her best to be a good person.

title: Lou's Team: The Story of the Humboldt Crabs
overview: Nestled in the redwood forest of Northern California, the Humboldt Crabs, founded in 1945, are the oldest continuously operated summer collegiate baseball team, with their own band, ardent fans, and tradition of winning.

title: PAPERWINGS
overview: In a cramped apartment that feels like it’s collapsing in on itself, two young men try to outrun addiction and each other. Jay is fighting for sobriety. Alex is fighting not to feel. When pills resurface between them, what starts as a familiar argument spirals into a breaking point that tests the limits of love, loyalty, and survival. Paperwings is an intimate, claustrophobic portrait of codependency, recovery, and the fragile hope of choosing to live.

title: When Worlds Collide
overview: Lana Maxwell becomes the prime suspect in the murder of her friend Veronica. Watch as her life unfolds and she deals with the challenges that being a teenager brings. Meanwhile Evelyn Jackson is going through friend group problems, and decides to make friends with a controversial figure.

title: The Quiet Kind of Drowning
overview: In a town where the past never stays buried, the children of the esteemed families of Hallowridge find themselves trapped in a cycle that began long before they were born. When a new death echoes a tragedy from decades ago, old secrets rise to the surface — threatening to tear apart the people who’ve spent their lives trying to outrun them. Whispers turn to clues. Clues turn to consequences. And the truth… refuses to stay hidden.

title: The Pledge
overview: Giving a pledge to the mother of a murdered child to find the killer, the police officer sacrifices his career and spends years waiting for someone who might appear again.

title: Carmen
overview: An obsessed director, filming a modern adaptation of "Carmen," falls in love with the lead actress and gradually blurs the line between cinema and reality, turning the set into an arena of jealousy and self-destruction.

title: Signal One
overview: A computer scientist is invited by a tech billionaire to join his private facility on a Caribbean island to investigate extraterrestrial matter on Earth. When they make contact beyond our world, chaos erupts as we’re left to wonder: do they come in peace?

title: Secretary
overview: When Casey, a newly hired secretary, starts getting anonymous letters from an obsessed mystery lover, she starts going down a path of terror and fear when the mystery person starts to track her down

title: Needle & The Chronic
overview: With a little help from their friends, two young trans women navigate an uncertain future after a break-up.

title: Gokaiger Goseiger Super Sentai 199 Hero Great Battle: Movie Release Commemorative Special
overview: A televised special to commemorate the theatrical release of Gokaiger Goseiger Super Sentai 199 Hero Great Battle, commeorating the 35th anniversary of the Super Sentai franchise.

title: Verra
overview: A North Korean girl escapes her country to start a new life in France. However, things don't go as expected. She is mentally sick.

title: Spare Me!
overview: A teenage bowling prodigy enters a high-stakes tournament with one goal: win the prize money and save his struggling orphanage from closing its doors. Standing in his way is a, tatted up loud mouth desperate to claim the same prize money to pay off a dangerous mob debt. As the unlikely rivals clash, the competition spirals into a showdown filled with outrageous antics. With everything on the line, it becomes more than a battle for money— it’s a fight for survival, redemption, and the only family either of them has left.

title: VENDETTA-THE BEAST WITHIN
overview: An assassin’s brutal past collides with fate, igniting relentless revenge.

title: Son of a Rich 3
overview: Grisha, who has successfully managed projects to correct spoiled brats, now faces a difficult task – reeducating not just one person, but an entire family.

title: My Wife Cries
overview: A normal working day on a construction site. Thomas, a 40-year-old crane operator, receives a call from his wife asking him to pick her up from the hospital. He finds her crying.

title: This Is Buzz
overview: A mind-blowing music documentary about the first immersive TV show on MTV when MTV was cool.

title: Kijsada Paradise
overview: A friend who goes missing in an abandoned amusement park sets the friendship of a group of teenagers to a challenge as they encounter conflict and secrets along the way.

title: DRUID
overview: 60 AD. Romans tighten their grip on Britannia. Druidism is hunted almost to extinction. after being driven out of their commune, Rhiain- a young druid and her master Gwen are forced to flee and traverse the wilds of Britannia in order to reach the sanctuary of the Druids - Ynys Môn. On their journey they will encounter great challenges and unlikely allies on a quest that will decide not only their survival, but the future of their way of life itself.

title: Funk
overview: The rise of MC Sabrina, a young Brazilian funk singer, from her beginnings in Morro dos Prazeres to the electrifying favela parties that pulse through the heart of Rio de Janeiro.

title: Runners
overview: Ben is sent on a delivery job for his father, when his brother Harry unexpectedly joins him. As suspicion grows and tension rises, only one question comes to mind: what’s in the boot?

title: Broken Records
overview: A renowned DJ/producer, Preston "Kilotile" Plante, is caught in a web of police corruption and false accusations, fighting for justice over seven harrowing years, with his story brought to life through a blend of real and AI-generated footage.

title: Disclosure Day
overview: If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you?

title: Stop! That! Train!
overview: Best friends Tess and DeeDee, train stewardesses, trade their dreary shifts on the Stank Rail for the glitzy Glamazonian Express. When a catastrophic “Stormaganza” threatens to derail the high-speed train, the duo in coach must join forces with the snobby first class attendants and President Gagwell to save the day.

title: Main Vaapas Aaunga
overview: An elderly man remains haunted by a childhood romance and memories of love lost during the 1947 Partition of India. As he shares his story with his grandson, the past unfolds through memories of migration, longing, and a love that endures across generations.

title: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Maddie's Secret
overview: By day, bright-eyed, kind-hearted Maddie is a dishwasher at Gourmaybe, a trendy Los Angeles food content creation company, and at night makes scrumptious vegetarian dishes, captured in videos by her devoted husband Jake. When one of the videos goes viral and she is thrust into the spotlight, the pressure heralds the inopportune return of a long-dormant struggle with an eating disorder.

title: 49 Miles More
overview: On their way to an annual reunion with university friends, Max—an unlucky insurance salesman struggling to find his place in life—and his carefree best friend Doug hit an unexpected roadblock when their car breaks down in the middle of nowhere.

title: The End of the World
overview: During a self-taped audition for a film about the apocalypse, 15-year-old Tyler realizes that the end might not be fiction after all.

title: Presenting: The End of the World
overview: During a self-taped audition for a film about the apocalypse, 15-year-old Tyler realizes that the end might not be fiction after all.

title: Gemini
overview: As a career-defining performance approaches, a young composer becomes unsettled by a piece of music that seems to surface unbidden, drawing him into a confrontation with his own self-doubt.

title: Chhaki Suna
overview: Each victim holds a piece of the puzzle, but solving this deadly game could make the investigator the final player.

title: Corpus
overview: Diane loves coding, but her dream is to become a journalist at the prestigious Nowgazine. When her boyfriend lands the job for himself, war is declared.

title: JIĀ: A Taiwan Story
overview: Upcoming Hugh J. Service Taiwan Documentary.

title: Swamped
overview: A 19 year old college student named Rowan lives through a day in her life, which means constant agony in her own brain. Rowan is trapped in a battle with herself, dealing with her obsessions and compulsions, as well as trying to adjust to a new social life.

title: Before Me
overview: A heartbroken photographer falls for an aspiring writer, but after discovering her secret past his retroactive jealousy threatens to ruin everything.

title: NJPW Dominion 6.14 In Osaka-Jo Hall
overview: Dominion 6.14 In Osaka-Jo Hall was a professional wrestling event promoted by New Japan Pro Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on June 14, 2026, at Osaka-Jo Hall in Osaka, Japan.

title: UFC Freedom 250: Topuria vs. Gaethje
overview: UFC Freedom 250: Topuria vs. Gaethje (also known as UFC White House) was a mixed martial arts event produced by the Ultimate Fighting Championship that took place on June 14, 2026, on the South Lawn of the White House in Washington, D.C., United States.  The event's name is a reference to the America 250th anniversary in the United States.

title: Pomodoro
overview: Two aspiring sibling chefs scramble to prepare an elaborate dinner to prove themselves to their harsh food critic mother. As the night unfolds, their talent and ambition shine, but so do buried tensions and long-standing resentment.

title: Cinco botones
overview: An anciet leyend is back to scare a group of history students

title: Alma
overview: A young woman, in the midst of caring for her dying father, begins to crumble under the weight of her life.

title: Veronica's Secret
overview: A girl's disappearance spirals into unraveling a dark past and its secrets.

title: Al di là di ogni ragionevole dubbio (Cronaca di un giudizio mediatico)
The Invisible Half
overview: Elena, a "half" Japanese high school girl, struggles with her identity. While constantly watched, she discovers she's also being watched by something else—a monster that can only be seen through her smartphone and heard through her earphones.

title: Breaking Cover
overview: A seemingly ordinary back-office worker whose father-daughter hunting trip turns into a relentless fight for survival, and the father's past as a covert operative is unearthed.

title: Pieces of a Foreign Life
overview: Woman flees war-torn Syria, leaving family behind. Seeking asylum in Bordeaux, she meets French lawyer who helps her rebuild life. Unexpected relationship forms between them amid her struggle to resettle.

title: Jim Queen and the Quest for Chloroqueer
overview: When Heterosis - a mysterious virus that turns gay men straight sweeps through the Parisian gay scene, Jim, the six packed sovereign of the Gym Queens, goes from Pride royalty to social outcast. With only Lucien, a freshly-out twink with more heart than abs, still by his side, Jim must race to find a cure before the disease erases the community that once worshipped him.

title: Strawberry Fields Forever
overview: The year-round residents in a lakeside campsite have to leave because of a sale.

title: The Whale and the Musician
overview: An electronic composer sets out to sea, where his music evokes a deep, poetic resonance in a humpback whale. Can we communicate with animals through music?

title: Return to the Moon (or Nothing)
overview: "For months we experimented and represented ourselves, starting with simple walks in search of material for a thesis. How can we visually recreate a memory? We walked and filmed, photographed and painted, got to know each other and told our stories. An experience transformed into a story that speaks of a shared journey, made up of filming, changes of season, conversations about the moon, and exchanges of techniques. Inspired by “Dark Side of the Moon,” we tried to represent the intimate and personal emotions that came to us through the album. Each song has a language, each movement a color, each sound an expression. What remains today, half a century later? Something inexplicable, perhaps. A wonderful creation of friendship and mutual artistic esteem, the (re)creation of multiple memories, which overlap like membranes on the screen. - Erik Negro

title: Gorgonà
overview: Greece. A small, impoverished city-state dominated by a massive refinery—its only source of income: oil. The men, all armed, hold absolute power. Their leader, Nikos, is gravely ill and must arrange his succession. Shock spreads when he includes his protégé, Maria, among the contenders. The fate of this young woman—unaware of the most tragic part of her family’s past—will be turned upside down by the arrival of Eleni, a singer at the town’s bar.

title: Meet Me in the Margins
overview: A book editor secretly pens her own romance manuscript, only to find unexpected editorial notes from a mysterious critic in the margins. The film is a witty, heartwarming story about finding love between the lines.

title: Two Times João Liberada
overview: João, an actress from Lisbon, as she stars in a biopic about Liberada, a gender-nonconforming figure persecuted by the Portuguese Inquisition in the 18th century. The film's production becomes a battleground as João clashes with the director over how Liberada’s legacy should be portrayed. These tensions deepen as João's dreams are increasingly haunted by Liberada's ghost, blurring the lines between past and present. When the director succumbs to a mysterious paralysis, leaving the film unfinished, João is left to navigate the unfolding chaos. She faces unanswerable questions, not only about the film's future but also about her own connection to Liberada’s spirit and story.

title: Sechswochenamt
overview: While the world is in lockdown as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic, Lore has to cope with a painful loss: her mother has died. Back in the small town of Erkelenz in North Rhine-Westphalia, she struggles against entrenched family structures and a paralyzing bureaucracy. Above all, she has to find a way to come to terms with the death and say goodbye to her mother.

title: Робоняня
overview: Cheerful and inventive Zlata, who stays at home alone for the sake of the school ball and the first kiss, under the supervision of the newest robot nanny Notrix. Confident that she can easily trick the car, Zlata soon discovers that she is dealing with an invulnerable opponent who controls the entire house. Desperate, she and her neighbor Nikita, who is in love with her, find an unconventional way out - they begin to communicate with the robot in its language, using "perfect promts". Their friendship with their iron friend is rapidly gaining momentum and leads to a huge party, which turns into real chaos. It is at this moment that Zlata has to make a choice and understand what true friendship and self-sacrifice are.

title: Cartório das Almas
overview: Laura, a “young woman” of 126 years old, is the newly hired at Notary of Souls. In her new role, she records the motivations of those who renounced eternity. However, by contract, Laura herself cannot interrupt her tedious existence.

title: Hoppy Ending
overview: A cheerful Easter village, famous for its giant bunny mascots and pastel-colored egg hunts, hides a dark secret. Years ago, a corporate Easter mascot company mysteriously went bankrupt, and the mascots “disappeared” during the closing ceremony. Locals whisper about the “Hollow Hare,” a terrifying entity born from the mascots’ abandoned costumes and the children’s forgotten toys.

title: Slackers
overview: A slingshot is loaded, the stone flies and crashes - the neighbor's window breaks. Ramona (Bella Lochmann) and Nico (Pola Geiger) are friends, lazy bums and fresh out of school. But instead of thinking about their future, they prefer to let the hot Berlin summer get the better of them. When they release a beloved neighbor's bird, they have to flee - into the politically charged world that they really don't want to be in. A road trip through Berlin begins - but on foot. On their aimless and half-hearted search for the escaped bird and their little brother, they struggle for their friendship, their belief in themselves and unexpectedly stumble upon other life stories that give hope.

title: GƎNƎSIS
overview: Eva, raised in an artificial Eden to obey the voice of a god who controls her, discovers a message revealing that her world is a carefully constructed lie. Driven by her need for freedom, she must challenge the system to escape the only place she has ever known.

title: Toy Story 5
overview: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new threat to playtime.

title: All of a Sudden
overview: Marie-Lou Fontaine, director of a nursing home in the Paris suburbs, defies convention by adopting the 'Humanitude' method despite her team’s resistance. Her encounter with Mari Morisaki, a terminally ill Japanese playwright, transforms her life. Together, they turn the facility into a symbol of resistance and humanity against the system’s limits.

title: Girls Like Girls
overview: Coley, 17, from rural Oregon, navigates intimacy after her mother's passing. Meeting Sonya sparks new feelings, but self-doubt hinders their connection. Sonya, unfamiliar with dating girls, is uncertain. They learn to embrace emotions.

title: Night & Day
overview: Based on Virginia Woolf’s funniest novel, Night & Day is an unromantic comedy about a passionate astronomer who does everything she can to avoid romantic love and marriage. The story of heroine Katharine Hilbery’s bold challenge to the Edwardian patriarchy is set against the backdrop of the suffragette movement and advances in science and technology, at the turn of the 20th century.

title: Leviticus
overview: Two teenage boys must escape a violent entity that takes the form of the person they desire most — each other.

title: Voicemails for Isabelle
overview: A young woman copes with her sister’s death by leaving her voicemails chronicling her chaotic life in San Francisco. When the number is unknowingly reassigned, an elusive Austin real estate agent begins receiving the hilariously confessional messages.

title: & Sons
overview: A world-renowned but reclusive novelist, believing he is about to die, summons his estranged sons to his home. But instead of seeking forgiveness for their shattered family, he tells them a wild and unbelievable secret that could rewrite their past.

title: Kokurojo: The Samurai and the Prisoner
overview: Provincial lord of the Arioka Castle, Murashige Araki, rebels against tyrannical despot Oda Nobunaga, and makes a stand at his stronghold castle. He decides to take siege but is subsequently surrounded by Oda's forces, leaving its denizens isolated and in need of allies. With the sensitive support of his wife Chiyoho, Murashige struggles to keep his hot-blooded retainers in check, while also protecting the castle and its people. One day, a young samurai is murdered within the fortress with the mysterious killer unknown. A succession of bizarre incidents follows. The suspects are Murashige's close retainers and the people inside the Arioka Castle's land. Outside, enemy troops lie in wait. Inside, traitors lie to conceal themselves. As suspicion runs rampant, Murashige seeks the help of a prisoner in his dungeon—dangerous master tactician Kanbei Kuroda—to solve the mysteries.

title: Black Men in Uniform
overview: Pata Seca  (1828), a man whose back bore the whip marks of his enslavers , whose eyes held the haunted memory of being forced to breed over 200 slave children in order to sustain his master’s plantation.  Men broken but unbowed, transformed from field hands into soldiers from the civil war to Vietnam.  This documentary weaves together authentic narratives from the 1800s, accompanied by original images and footage, highlighting the significant influence that Black men in uniform had in Hollywood and addressing ongoing relevant issues to date.

title: You Are the Film
overview: The directorial debut of Makoto Ueda, the award-winning writer of such films as Beyond the Infinite Two Minutes, River, Night is Short Walk on Girl, etc

title: Magical Secret Tour
overview: A mother of two who suddenly learns of her husband’s embezzlement and crushing debts; a researcher buried in debt; and an unmarried, pregnant woman with no savings. Three women who seem to have nothing to do with crime cross paths by chance and, through gold smuggling, form an unexpected bond as partners in crime. As they seize money and freedom, a revenge game begins—one that allows each of them to reclaim and rebuild their lives. The sight of women who have long gone with the flow of life, choosing to take their fate into their own hands even if it means crossing the line into crime, shines with a dazzling intensity.

title: Effi o Blaenau
overview: Hard-partying young woman Effi lives in rural Wales, whose life largely revolves around drinking vodka with her friends and eating instant noodles to cure her subsequent hangovers – until her life suddenly changes dramatically.

title: Iván & Hadoum
overview: Iván (33), a trans man, and Hadoum (30), a Spanish-Moroccan woman, fall in love at the industrial greenhouse they work in. While facing the opposition from their families and co-workers, Iván realizes he doesn’t need to be the man he is expected to be.

title: Love & Other Crimes
overview: Noah Thomas's life takes a dangerous turn when a chance reunion with an old high school friend entangles him in a ruthless crime ring. As he falls deeper into the syndicate's violent world, his budding romance with Shaye Matthews offers a fragile glimmer of hope. Torn between love and survival, Noah must navigate betrayals, escalating stakes, and deadly choices that threaten to destroy everything he values.

title: Chaali Din
overview: Chaali Din is an adaption of best selling punjabi novel of the same name. This gripping story by Gurpreet Dhugga delves into the complexities of human emotions and relationships over a transformative 40-day journey. The book explores themes of love, loss, redemption, and self-discovery through vivid storytelling and well-drawn characters. With its gripping narrative and profound insights, this work captures the essence of life’s challenges and triumphs.

title: Good Vibes Only
overview: Penny has always believed that life is all sunshine and rainbows. When she discovers that toxic positivity is indeed a thing, her whole world is flipped upside down.

title: Chuckle Chuckle
overview: Aiming to become comedians, Sahara and his comedy partner Setoguchi work together on their act, "Ultrasweet Sourpork", until unfortunate circumstances lead to their disbandment. Hindered by roadblocks on the path to success, Sahara suddenly encounters an "ideal" version of himself—an ultra-famous comedian. Boasting rich knowledge for success as a comedian, this "ideal" Sahara begins meddling with the real Sahara's life.

title: Synthetic Sincerity
overview: Marc Isaacs makes a deal with The Synthetic Sincerity Lab, an AI research project affiliated with the University of Southern England. There, researchers are investigating the possibility of teaching AI characters authenticity, using characters from Isaacs’ documentaries to do so. In return, they allow Isaacs to film the process.

title: YURIE
overview: ​​Three years have passed since Joji Uehara lost his father and took over his eatery "Yurie". Despite Joji's impressive culinary skills, his business continues to dwindle. One day, Kim Joo-ri, who came from South Korea to learn Japanese cuisine, arrives at the restaurant by coincidence. Although they clash over their differing values, the two of them gradually become closer as they work together to revive the struggling business. Guided by Kim's charmingly unconventional approach to life, the people around her begin to break free from their rigid minds.

title: UK Holiday
overview: A UK Holiday is not just a journey; it’s an adventure filled with love, laughter, and unforgettable memories. The story revolves around Aakash, a kind-hearted and adventurous young man, who invites his sister Rekha from the USA to visit the UK for a long-awaited family reunion. Rekha, excited to escape her routine, is thrilled to meet their mother, Subhadra, and sisters Priyanka and Deepika, who already reside in the UK. Aakash ensures this holiday becomes a truly special experience. Together, they explore London’s iconic landmarks like the London Eye and Tower Bridge. The journey takes them to the natural wonder of Durdle Door in Dorset and the charming town of Aldershot. Along the way, they share stories, laughter, and moments of deep connection. This feature film captures the essence of holidays—taking a break, reconnecting with loved ones, and creating memories that last a lifetime. UK Holiday is a celebration of family, adventure, and the joy of togetherness.

title: PEAK END
overview: "Hey Rin, let’s send a jam sandwich to space." Rin came to Kyoto from Seoul, and Sola came to Kyoto from Okinawa. They met at university and have since pursued filmmaking together. They like having fun and they like filming funny things and laughing together. They want to fly a jam sandwich. They want to shoplift a film camera. They want to trace Sora's family roots in Okinawa. The two sublimate their desires to filmmaking. For the two, film is like a magic wand. They transform it into all kinds of genres and put themselves in it. The two desire to know each other, but never compromise and, instead, accept their uncertain identities just to have the greatest conversation.

title: Night of the Vamp-Friars
overview: A group of friends in a punk rock band discover a hidden cemetery in the woods where they accidentally raise a group of undead Friars.

title: Short Sharp Scares: Teraphobia
overview: Fear isn't always irrational.

title: Adgwa-Ata
overview: Abducted by a jungle tribe to undergo a brutal initiation, three teenage girls enter a divine realm where taming giant snakes – their totem animals – becomes a rite of passage into adulthood.

title: THE CAGE WITHIN
overview: A true fight isn’t fought in the ring, but inside the mind.  The Cage Within follows Jake, a young fighter struggling with anger, trauma and the weight of expectations, as he tries to break the cycle of violence that shaped him. Between training, silence and fractured relationships, the film observes a man who chooses not to become what hurt him — even when that choice hurts more.  An intimate, restrained drama about masculinity, control and the quiet cost of change.

title: Songe
overview: On his deathbed, his last memories accompany him.

title: Ultra Strong
overview: Catherine tries to toughen herself to impress the “princes” in her circle, who turn out to be more off-putting than charming. When all her dubious strategies fail, she must face the ultimate test: learning how to embrace her true nature.  In Ultra Strong, a candid and self-deprecating autofictional story by Catherine Lepage, we’re invited to reexamine our youthful ideals—from Cinderella to Iron Maiden.

title: Supergirl
overview: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

title: Les parfait(s)
overview: The Toussaint family are expert hustlers on the run who adopt the unassuming identities of the “Perfects” and settle in Scotland. As they juggle new jobs, nosy colleagues and a mysterious neighbor, their elaborate disguises, gadgets and insane schemes threaten to expose their double life.

title: Fallen From Olympus
overview: Following the Trojan War, a soldier facing death encounters Thanatos and is drawn into a mythological confrontation about life, fate, and the meaninglessness of war.

title: The Collected Pieces of Eleanor Ross
overview: Unsatisfied with her prospects following graduation, struggling artist Eleanor "Nell" Ross reflects on her life with her boyfriend over a game of dominoes.

title: Hungry
overview: A high school wrestling coach must overcome addictive behavior in ordere to lead his team to a championship.

title: God Is Still Brazilian
overview: God needs to return to Earth when celestial beings rebel against humanity and decide to launch another meteor to exterminate life on the planet.

title: Feed
overview: Five social media influencers spend a weekend at a forest retreat but inadvertently awaken and confront the world's first vampire.

title: Jackass 5
overview: The fifth installment in the “Jackass” movie series. Plot TBA.

title: Return to Your Dreams
overview: Waking up from a dream he can't seem to forget, Faizan struggles to maintain the newly structured life he's built for himself. As more dreamy memories from his past continue to resurface, he soon learns that the nightmarish ones still refuse to let him go.

title: The Lotus
overview: An unspoken truth of millions of women.

title: If You had Stayed
overview: After a tragic choice leads him to the brink, a disillusioned artist named Michael awakens on a mysterious beach. a liminal space where lost souls come to confront their pasts. Guided by Bob, a charismatic yet enigmatic caretaker, Michael embarks on a surreal journey through the pivotal moments of his life: love, heartbreak, and devastating loss. As he confronts hidden truths and unspoken regrets, Michael is faced with one profound question: Was it worth it, and what would life be like if he had stayed?

title: Wildman
overview: An aloof young man escapes to the wilds of Yosemite in the throes of a depressive episode. His only companion is a camera.

title: Carry On Jatta 4
overview: "Carry On Jatta 4" is the fourth installment of the iconic Punjabi comedy franchise, produced by Humble Motion Pictures, set for release on June 26, 2026. Expect a hilarious rollercoaster of misunderstandings, quirky characters, and laugh-out-loud moments, continuing the legacy of the beloved series.

title: Little Brother
overview: A famous real estate agent's carefully curated world is upended when his eccentric “little brother” unexpectedly reappears.

title: The Invite
overview: Joe and Angela’s marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals  into unexpected places. Have they reignited the spark or lit the match that burns it all down?

title: Recep Ivedik 8
overview: 8th installment of Recep İvedik. Plot TBA.

title: Sinsin and the Mouse
overview: A young Japanese woman (Yukino Kishii), who is reeling from the death of her much loved mother, decides to take a trip to Taiwanese capital Taipei to try to alleviate her loss. While there, an encounter with a young man (Jing-Hua Tseng) sees the pair strike up a tentative friendship that could help her come to terms with the death. Yukinori Makabe builds his sensitive drama around the delicate and nuanced central performances from Kishii and Tseng, elegantly weaving together the present and memory to show the lingering impact of grief on everyday life, while offering a gently hopeful sweep.

title: The Boy at the Edge of the World
overview: Omul lives with his family on a remote island in the Fire Archipelago. During a beach trip, a storm sweeps Omul and his younger sister Kimi into the sea, where Omul witnesses a mysterious creature threatening Kimi’s soul.  Rescued by a whale, the siblings survive, but Kimi is left in a coma. Omul’s ability to talk to animals becomes crucial as he and his brother – who blames him for the accident – set out to find Sadumea, the mythical figure behind Kimi’s torment.  With their dog Tela, they embark on a dangerous expedition deep into the island to save Kimi…

title: Nicolás de Jesús' Now You See Me...
overview: Struggling fair owner Kesselring (Nicolás de Jesús) is given a unique opportunity to restore the fair to its former glory when his friend Dr. Goodkat (Fredy Roque) introduces him to Marcus Kelevra (Alexis Adrián), a man whose mysterious act will draw people back to the fair, at a deadly cost, and even sparking interest among his fellow fairgoers.

title: The Defectors
overview: In a near-future surveillance state, a detective secretly aligned with a rebellion investigates the assassination of their leader under the watchful eye of his manipulative new partner.

title: Judge Michael - Rise of the Law
overview: A new enemy has risen on mega city one, his name is Voss Kane " The Ripper " bringing chaos to the streets, now a new judge has emerged from the hall of justice teached by Dredd himself, to uphold the law and bring justice to the streets.

title: The Prayer of The Rose
overview: An emotional journey of a teenage boy asking God to liberate him from his self-inflicted downfall.

title: Be Forever Yamato - Rebel 3199 - Part 6: Blue Labyrinth
overview: Part 6 of the theatrical version of the third Yamato remake show.

title: Le Train de Minuit: Sous l'Emprise de Luisa
You're Just Tired
overview: Feeling isolated, lonely, and bored, new mother Lydia struggles to grasp what's real and what's her imagination.

title: A Great Sailor
overview: A sailor has a lucky catch

title: Promises
overview: A reclusive electronic musician disappears from public life. After three years of isolation, control and self-destruction, he creates an image that will allow him to return unnoticed. The film is loosely based on the biography of the French DJ Mike Lévy, known as Gesaffelstein, in the three years of his disappearance from the public eye before adopting his signature black mask.

title: Cheesy Fingers
overview: squeak squeak squeak squeak CHEESE squeak squeak

title: Source Connection
overview: When an investigative reporter shows up to meet her source, he proves reticent at first, but then gives the information she's looking for. Together they're working to uncover the ills of the city.

title: Minions & Monsters
overview: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.
